summary: The user was diagnosed with chronic sinusitis by ENT specialist Dr. Patel and is seeking ways to manage their symptoms, including fatigue and joint pain. They are also concerned about the potential impact of a recent urinary tract infection (UTI) and antibiotics on their overall health and plan to follow up with both Dr. Patel and their primary care physician.
facts: The user was diagnosed with chronic sinusitis by ENT specialist Dr. Patel. Dr. Patel prescribed a nasal spray for the user's chronic sinusitis. The user has been experiencing fatigue and joint pain, which they are unsure if it's related to their chronic sinusitis. The user recently had a urinary tract infection and was prescribed antibiotics. The user plans to schedule a follow-up appointment with Dr. Patel to discuss the impact of their UTI and antibiotic use on their chronic sinusitis. The user will also schedule a follow-up appointment with their primary care physician to discuss their fatigue and joint pain symptoms.
